source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The piston/cylinder arrangement contains 10 g ammonia at 20\circ\text{C} with a volume of 1 L. There are some stops, so if the piston is at the stops, the volume is 1.4 L. The ammonia is now heated to 200\circ\text{C}. The piston and cylinder are made of 0.5 kg aluminum. Assume that the mass has the same temperature as the ammonia at any time. Find the heat transfer.

There are some stops, so if the piston is at the stops, the volume is 1.4 L. The ammonia is now heated to 200\circ\text{C}. The piston and cylinder are made of 0.5 kg aluminum. Assume that the mass has the same temperature as the ammonia at any time. Find the heat transfer.
